entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Field Enhancement
entry.content:
Hi at all,

this working for me so far. I want that the fields are also shown in the with debitor role. The fields are only visible in the customer role. 
Please see the attachment. How can I change this, that the fields in both roles are available.

 

I also enhance the role supplier. Here I has the same problem. The fields are only in the supplier role visible an not in the kreditor role.  

 


Thank you. 

Gunter

entry.title: Custom form template is not available in another client of dev environment
entry.content: I have been working on PO based custom form template. I created a custom form template in DEV100 client but its not available in DEV200 client. Normally all the workbench objects are already available in the different client of same environment but I am unable to find custom form templates created via Manage form template app.

entry.title: BAPI_PO_Create1 for Return PO
entry.content:
Hello Experts!!

Using BAPI "BAPI_PO_CREATE1" create a return po.

In header i provided

INPUT PARAMETER:
POHEADER
COMP_CODE =Value
DOC_TYPE = ZRNB
VENDOR = Value.
PURCH_ORG = value
PUR_GROUP Value

POHEADERX:

COMP_CODE = X
DOC_TYPE = X
VENDOR = X
PURCH_ORG = X
PUR_GROUP = X

POITEM:

PO_ITEM 00010
MATERIAL = Value
PLANT = D001
STGE_LOC = 0001
QUANTITY = 100
PO_UNIT = EA
NET_PRICE = 40
PRICE_UNIT  = 1
ORDERPR_UN = EA
RET_ITEM = X

POITEMX:

PO_ITEM = X
MATERIAL = X
PLANT = X
STGE_LOC = X
QUANTITY = X
PO_UNIT = X
NET_PRICE = X
PRICE_UNIT = X
ORDERPR_UN = X
RET_ITEM = X

POCOND:

ITM_NUMBER = 00010
COND_TYPE = ZA00
COND_VALUE = 40
CURRENCY = BDT
CHANGE_ID = I

POCONDX:

ITM_NUMBER = X
COND_TYPE = X
COND_VALUE = X
CURRENCY = X
CHANGE_ID = X

Its return me a PO number.

Whenever I try to open it on me22n/me23n its give :

Document 1200700197 does not exist

"RETURN": [
{
"TYPE": "S",
"ID": "06",
"NUMBER": "017",
"MESSAGE": "Return PO to Vendor created under the number 1200700197",
"LOG_NO": "",
"LOG_MSG_NO": "000000",
"MESSAGE_V1": "Return PO to Vendor",
"MESSAGE_V2": "1200700197",
"MESSAGE_V3": "",
"MESSAGE_V4": "",
"PARAMETER": "POHEADER",
"ROW": 1,
"FIELD": "",
"SYSTEM": "ECQCLNT200"
}.

How to get relief from this issues.

Please guided me.

Regards-

Rajib

entry.title: Re: Stock check when creating the requisition or Shopping...
entry.content:
Hi 

Can you try availability check as mentioned in below thread. It might help you

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/availability-check-for-stock-purchase-requisition/qaq-p/8163562

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/check-availability-button-in-purchase-requisition/qaq-p/2850786

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/availability-check-in-purchase-requisition/qaq-p/3152361

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: BOM creation error
entry.content: how to resolve this issue

entry.title: Re: Mr11 GR/IR
entry.content: Yes, I've noticed that. There are no notes for "position 5". That's why I recommended SAP support, if the note provided doesn't work.

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Copy Actual of Las...
entry.content: Dear @MoonJun, Its done now. I used Config.Hierarchy for declaration.

entry.title: Re: How to find a CDS view for a classic Table in ABAP? - Cheat Sheet
entry.content:
Hi @LBretschneider,

interesting approach for an actual problem! But, to be honest, bruteforcing all cds views, just to export them to Excel and build up on that feels like the wrong approach in times of S/4HANA 😄

There is one important tool you missed in your tool list. Its the App "View Browser" (F2170) which, in my opinion, should be available to all technical and functional consultants.

It allows you to search all cds views in the system by table name (Button "Alternative Search" --> Add table name to Keyword field --> Check checkbox "Table Names" --> press "Search").

You can also filter the found views by the release state either for cloud development or key user.

This would have allowed you to find your view I_StorageLocation in seconds 👍

entry.title: How to request SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
How to request SAP Cloud ALM? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to request SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear customer,

for SAP Cloud ALM provisioning steps, kindly review https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/provisioning?locale=en-US

or SAP KBA 3081894    How to Request SAP Cloud ALM? - Video

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: XSUAA Configuration
entry.content: @thomas_jung Would you be able to help?

entry.title: Re: Stock check when creating the requisition or Shopping...
entry.content: I don't think it's going to work - ATP check is used for issues not receipts.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA OUTPUT MANAGEMENT USING BRF+ For Settlement Document in 2022 On-Premises editions
entry.content:
A solution regarding printer settings is described in SAP note 3067986

 

Regards

Werner

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_Create1 for Return PO
entry.content: After call of BAPI_PO_CREATE1 and when no error returned in RETURN (seems the case) call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT.

entry.title: Periodic-specific consumption of PIR
entry.content:
Hi all,

I having the following issue and I hope someone can help me.

 

With S4 there is a new consumption mode 5 = periodic-specific consumption for PIRs. To my knowledge this mode only allocate sales orders or other demands with PIR in the same planning period.

So far this sounds exactly what we need. Now to my issue:

We distribute our PIRs on working days from Monday to Friday. In that case the planning period is days and the consumption is only allocating sales orders with PIRs on the same day.

But we would like to have the consumption within the same week, independent of on which day we have sales order. Right now we are using backward/forward consumption with the problem that sales orders depended on the day can be allocated with PIRs in the previous week or the week after.

 

So the question is: is there a way/setting that I can have a periodic-specific consumptions in weeks and keep the distribution of PIRs on days?

 

If someone could help me with that, would be great!

Thank you and BR

Martin

entry.title: Re: Impact on ESS/MSS apps ECC to S/4 Hana
entry.content: Awaiting for your kindly reply...

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_Create1 for Return PO
entry.content:
if you want to test on SE37 transaction you can use test sequence:

SE37 -> Function Module -> Execute -> Test Sequences

it will open a box so you have to put the funciontions you want to test like: BAPI_PO_CREATE1 and bapi_transaction_commit and execute

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Field Enhancement
entry.content:
Hello Gunter,

best way is to create your own Dataset (transaction BUS23) and assign this to your own view (transaction BUS5). After that add this new dataset to BP-Views (transaction BUSD) FLCU00, FLCU01, FLVN00 and FLVN01. From my point of view this will work.

Best Regards
Andi

entry.title: Rejection/ Reminder for RFQ's via Fiori using BRF+ output management
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in SAP fiori where one of the requirement is to send reminder/rejection email to suppliers for RFQ. It seems that this is not a standard functionality. 

 

Therefore, we thought about setting the output type in dispatch time 2 (scheduled) and try to force the sending by clicking on send output in application"Manage RFQ". The button remain grayed out and the status is either in preparation or to be output even after trying to use the app manage output items.

 

Is there any solution to force reminder/rejection email sending to suppliers?

entry.title: Re: Reg : Omiting Zero's in ADOBE output
entry.content:
Hi,

You need to declare the data type as char in the driver program and change the field type to Decimal in the adobe form level and test. It works.

Regards,

Saran.

entry.title: Re: Identity Provisioning Documentation Joined the Family of SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content:
@viacheslav1987 

Hi Viacheslav,

I'm not sure I've encountered any documentation describing the end-to-end scenario, either. In general, those users are called business users. You need at least these high-level steps:

  1. Establish Trust and Federation Between SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service and SAP Cloud Identity Services
  2. Map User Attributes from a Corporate Identity Provider for Business Users
  3. Configure Corporate Identity Providers
  4. Decide on Identity Federation

Apologies, but I'm not an expert, so I can't determine which scenario is more effective.

Best regards,

Ivelina

entry.title: Re: Error message when I use in enable now the function “...
entry.content: Hello, we updated the SAP Cloud ALM API Service Key

entry.title: Problem with Geo-coodinates colums
entry.content:
I request support, I managed to use the Geo-coodinates colums from the Datasphere and now when I try to view it again from the Datasphere the following message is displayed: Right now, there are no visible columns in the table. Please select the columns you need in the table settings.

The creation of the Location dimension is done as follows:
1. A graphical view called CRM_PropiedadeCroquiCliente_1 with the columns latitude and longitude is available.


2. Created a CRM_PropiedadeCroquiCliente_2 view with Semantic Usage "Dimension"


3. A Calculated Columns was created with Data Type hana. ST_Geometry from CRM_PropiedadeCroquiCliente_2

4. Created a CRM_PropiedadeCroquiCliente_3 view with Semantic Usage "Fact" and with Associations to CRM_PropiedadeCroquiCliente_2 by idparceiro


5. An Analytic Model was created CRM_PropiedadeCroquiClienteFinal_V1

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP , FREE_SELECTION_DAILOG , find option is nee...
entry.content:
No issue for me. I have created the GUI status with the function code ZZFIND, assigned to Ctrl+F, and I can use Ctrl+F.

As you didn't post your code, maybe your question is "how to add a custom button to the free selections dialog". Here's one way:

TYPES tt_table TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF rsdstabs WITH EMPTY KEY.
TYPES tt_event TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF rsdsevents WITH EMPTY KEY.
TYPES tt_field TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF rsdsfields WITH EMPTY KEY.

DATA(tables) = VALUE tt_table( ( prim_tab = 'SFLIGHT' ) ).
DATA(events) = VALUE tt_event( ( event = 'A'
                                 prog  = sy-repid
                                 form  = 'AT_SELECTION_SCREEN_INPUT' ) ).
DATA(l_selection_id) = VALUE rsdynsel-selid( ).
CALL FUNCTION 'FREE_SELECTIONS_INIT'
  IMPORTING  selection_id = l_selection_id
  TABLES     tables_tab   = tables
             events       = events
  EXCEPTIONS OTHERS       = 1.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
  DATA(pfkey) = VALUE rsdspfkey( pfkey   = 'FREE_SEL_STATUS'
                                 program = sy-repid ).
  DATA(where_clauses) = VALUE rsds_twhere( ).
  DATA(fields_dummy) = VALUE tt_field( ).
  CALL FUNCTION 'FREE_SELECTIONS_DIALOG'
    EXPORTING  selection_id  = l_selection_id
               pfkey         = pfkey
    IMPORTING  where_clauses = where_clauses
    TABLES     fields_tab    = fields_dummy
    EXCEPTIONS OTHERS        = 1.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    DATA(where_clause_first_table) = where_clauses[ 1 ].
    SELECT * FROM sflight INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_sflight) WHERE (where_clause_first_table-where_tab).
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.

FORM at_selection_screen_input TABLES g_seldyn STRUCTURE rsseldyn
                                      g_fldnum STRUCTURE rsdsfldnum.
  CASE sy-ucomm.
    WHEN 'ZZFIND'.
      " Do whatever you want
  ENDCASE.
ENDFORM.

entry.title: Re: Error message when I use in enable now the function “...
entry.content:
Hello, we updated the SAP Cloud ALM API Service Key one more time with this values:


"authorities": [
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.analytics.providers.read",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.analytics.read",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.bm.read",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.bsm.read",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.bsm.write",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.csa.read",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.defects.read",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.demo-tasks.read",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.documents.read",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.documents.write",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.event-situations.write",            
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.exm.personal.read",

            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.exm.write",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.hm.read",

            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.traces.write"
        ]


and get still the same error.

entry.title: Re: Restrict user to access service type Purchase Order only
entry.content:
hi @PhoebeYeo ,

Currently this functionality is not supported. You may help promote it by voting this improvement request

Regards,

Maya

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration requirement
entry.content:
Hey there!

If you're exploring options beyond the SAP BTP Integration Suite, eZintegrations might be a strong fit for your needs.

With built-in support for Kafka adapters, eZintegrations allow efficient connectivity for data streams, enabling real-time data sync between systems hosted on public cloud environments. It’s designed to simplify complex integrations without the need for extensive configuration, and it can handle high data volumes effortlessly.

For setup, eZintegrations can guide you on specific sender system requirements and streamline your integration flow, ensuring data flows smoothly across platforms.

entry.title: Re: Sales Pricing analysis Fiori App
entry.content: Currently there is no plan of deprecating VA01 /VA02/VA03

entry.title: Accelerating Data Migration with SAP BODS for Cloud Implementations
entry.content:
Overview
As enterprises increasingly migrate their systems and data to the cloud, data migration becomes a critical success factor. Successful migration requires ensuring data integrity, accuracy, and compatibility with cloud platforms. SAP BusinessObjects Data Services (BODS) provides robust capabilities to support these goals, facilitating efficient, secure, and scalable data migration processes.
 
Objective  
This white paper explores how SAP BODS can be utilized to accelerate data migration to the cloud, addressing common challenges, key advantages, and best practices for optimizing data migration projects.
 
Target Audience
This document is intended for data architects, IT managers, and business leaders interested in leveraging SAP BODS for cloud migration projects.
 
---
 
Why SAP BODS for Data Migration?
 
SAP BODS is a powerful ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) tool that offers a range of functionalities tailored for complex data integration and migration scenarios. Its feature-rich platform is particularly suited for cloud migration due to its flexibility, scalability, and extensive connectivity to diverse data sources.
 
Key Benefits of SAP BODS for Cloud Migration
1. Comprehensive Data Integration
   SAP BODS supports multiple data sources and formats, allowing seamless integration with legacy systems, on-premises databases, and other SAP applications. This flexibility is crucial when consolidating data from various sources before migrating to the cloud.
 
2. Scalability and Performance
   BODS is designed to handle high volumes of data, enabling organizations to scale their migration projects without compromising performance. Advanced data processing capabilities allow for efficient handling of large data sets, essential for cloud migration.
 
3. Data Quality and Cleansing
   Data quality is paramount during migration. SAP BODS includes powerful data profiling, cleansing, and validation tools, which help ensure that only accurate and reliable data is moved to the cloud.
 
4. Security and Compliance
   Security is a top concern for cloud migration projects. BODS provides encryption, masking, and other security features to protect sensitive information, ensuring that data migration meets compliance requirements.
 
---
 
**Key Features of SAP BODS in Cloud Migration**
 
1. Job Design and Workflow Automation
SAP BODS enables the design of data workflows that automate complex ETL tasks, such as data extraction, transformation, and loading. This automation reduces manual effort and minimizes human error during migration.
 
2. Real-Time Data Integration
For hybrid cloud environments, SAP BODS supports real-time data integration, allowing synchronization between on-premises and cloud-based systems. This capability is valuable for businesses that wish to maintain parallel environments or gradually transition to the cloud.
 
3. Data Quality Management
Data quality transformations in SAP BODS provide data cleansing, standardization, and deduplication. Built-in validation and matching rules help ensure that high-quality data is moved to the cloud, reducing post-migration cleanup.
 
4. Data Profiling and Auditing
With data profiling, users can analyze the structure, patterns, and completeness of data before migration. Auditing features in SAP BODS offer transparency into data flows, supporting regulatory compliance and governance requirements.
 
---
 
Best Practices for Using SAP BODS in Cloud Data Migration
 
1. **Define Clear Migration Objectives**  
   Set clear objectives, such as the type of data to migrate, deadlines, compliance requirements, and expected performance.
 
2. **Perform Data Assessment and Profiling Early**  
   Conduct data profiling at the start of the migration project to understand data structure and quality issues. This will help in designing transformations and mapping rules in SAP BODS.
 
3. **Develop a Robust Data Mapping Strategy**  
   Data mapping is essential for seamless migration. Define mapping rules and transformations in BODS to ensure that source data aligns with the target cloud schema.
 
4. **Leverage Parallel Processing for Large Data Volumes**  
   SAP BODS offers parallel processing to improve performance on large datasets. Utilize this feature to meet migration timelines without sacrificing data accuracy.
 
5. **Implement Data Quality Rules for Consistency**  
   Use SAP BODS data quality features to enforce consistency, accuracy, and completeness. This will reduce issues in the cloud environment and improve data reliability for downstream applications.
 
6. **Validate and Test Thoroughly**  
   Conduct rigorous testing after each stage of the migration to verify data integrity, transformation accuracy, and overall compatibility with the cloud environment.
 
---
 
Case Study: Large Enterprise Cloud Migration Using SAP BODS
 
### **Background**  
A global retail company decided to migrate its on-premises SAP and non-SAP databases to a cloud environment to increase operational efficiency and reduce costs. With extensive data spread across multiple systems, ensuring data quality and consistency was critical.
 
Solution Implementation
The company utilized SAP BODS to streamline the migration process. Key steps included data profiling, mapping, and transformation to align legacy data with the new cloud data model. Real-time integration was established to synchronize on-premises data with the cloud.
 
Results
The company achieved a 35% reduction in migration time and improved data accuracy by 20% using SAP BODS data quality tools. The streamlined ETL process minimized errors, while data cleansing reduced post-migration issues.
 
---
 
## **Challenges and How SAP BODS Mitigates Them**
 
### **Data Volume and Performance Constraints**  
**Challenge: ** Migrating large volumes of data can be time-consuming and resource intensive.
 
**Solution: ** SAP BODS' parallel processing capabilities allow data to be migrated faster, even with high data volumes, by splitting large datasets into manageable segments.
 
 **Data Quality and Consistency**  
**Challenge:** Poor data quality can lead to costly rework post-migration.
 
**Solution:** SAP BODS includes robust data quality and transformation features that enable data cleansing, profiling, and consistency checks before migration.
 
### **Security and Compliance Concerns**  
**Challenge: ** Sensitive data must be handled carefully to meet regulatory requirements.
 
**Solution: ** BODS supports encryption and data masking to ensure compliance with data protection standards, ensuring that data remains secure throughout the migration.
 
---
 
Conclusion
 
SAP BODS is a powerful tool for organizations looking to accelerate data migration to the cloud. Its capabilities in data integration, quality management, and automation make it a valuable asset in overcoming common cloud migration challenges. By following best practices and leveraging SAP BODS’ advanced features, organizations can achieve a smooth, secure, and efficient transition to cloud environments, ultimately enhancing business agility and supporting digital transformation goals.
 
---
 
References
- SAP BusinessObjects Data Services Documentation
- "Cloud Migration Strategies with SAP Solutions" - SAP Press  
- White papers and technical guides on SAP BODS functionalities

entry.title: SAP Cloud Identity Services and SAP ALM for business users
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM ; SAP Cloud Identity Services ; 

Dear SAP Community, 

I am working on getting more details and understanding of capabilities of SAP Cloud Identity Services through implementing cases focused on the integration of SAP Cloud Identity Services with local or customer identity providers, such as AD, ADFS, or local LDAP.

Currently, I would like to set the connection to SAP ALM for users who belong to a local identity provider (business users). We have many people who would like to work in ALM but I don't want to create manually the account for each user. The best is the user can login in ALM with the password of local identity provider and if the user belongs to the specific group in local Idp, then it should get a basic rights in ALM tenant. Specifically and most interesting, I am aiming to configure a scenario where users can log in to SAP ALM using their local identity provider passwords. From my understanding, there are three possible approaches:

  1. User provisioning operates in real-time, creating users upon their first connection to ALM. However, it appears that there is no target application related to ALM within IPS documentation.

  2. User provisioning operates in real-time, where the user is first created in IAS, with provisioning configured so that both source and target are set as IAS. A specific group can then be assigned to the user in IAS based on their group membership in the local identity provider. Using AD as a source in IPS is not good for us because we don't want to synch all AD users with IAS. *but may be we can use group as a filter to restrict the user list, however, AD as a source in IPS should be the last option if nothing else is available.

  3. Using the shadow user feature within the ALM tenant.

Questions:

  1. I have not found any documentation on configuring a scenario where a user can login to a BTP application using the login and password from a local identity provider. Is there guidance on this setup?

  2. Which of the three integrations above do you think would be the most effective for this task?

Thank you in advance for your feedback.

entry.title: Updated Learning Journey - Exploring the Lead to Cash Business Process in SAP Customer Experience
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community! Fernando at the controls!

Just two years ago in November, we released the Exploring the Lead to Cash Business Process in SAP Customer Experience learning journey.

After about 4,000 learners going over it and more than 1,000 record of achievement badges issued to those who have completed the whole course, we analyzed the feedback given to us, and started a mayor update of the whole course content.

This complete course update comes with a long number of changes:

  • Updated SAP Customer Experience Solutions Portfolio used during the business process.

 

  • Introduced Artificial Intelligence for CX and its use cases during the stages for lead to cash supported by all Customer Experience solutions.

 

  • Included a Business Sample to during all the Lead to Cash stages to visualize the steps.

 

  • Updated the Lead to Cash Process Variants with those already mentioned in SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

 

  • 10 net new units and lessons for all the Lead to Cash content with new videos, diagrams, text descriptions and further learning resources.

So, what are you waiting for? go to SAP Learning site, and enroll for the new updated version of Exploring the Lead to Cash Business Process in SAP Customer Experience, after completing it... Don't forget to claim your digital badge to show it in your professional social network profile!

I’ll be back very soon to present you new learning courses, live sessions, micro learnings and any other educational asset which can be interesting for you related to SAP Customer Experience Integration and Extensibility area!

In the mean time, I’ll be looking forward to your feedback and questions via comments here in this post.

entry.title: Re: Stock check when creating the requisition or Shopping...

When I was checking this thread then I thought if we get a message for ATP in PR  like purchase Order so we can think to do something for requirement. As my all system are freeze so I did not do any POC. thats why I said it might help I am not also sure 

Thanks for your feedback

Regards

Rashid

entry.title: Re: How to see Packing Instruction POP2 Change History
entry.content:
Hi for our future reference we have another way where we can activate table logging to track changes. but it should be activated for short time as it has impact on system performance

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-us/4d/b6d15036311dcee10000000a42189c/frameset.htm

 

Regards

Rashid

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA - OPD - Procedure creation and consumption
entry.content:
@mvescicik  To allow changes it is possible via enhancement in class CL_APOC_BRF_SETTINGS method GET_CHANGEABILITY. 

Set cv_changeable true.

entry.title: Re: How to handle wastage in production process of SAP Bu...
entry.content: @Felipe_Lima Thanks for the answer but there is no useful solution in this topic

entry.title: error: 80040154 received after Addon installation
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,
 
When we are installing Addon related with Crystal report and trying to generate Crystal report from it.
We are getting below error.

entry.title: How do I create a restricted key figure for opportunities missing product line item
entry.content:
Hi, 

I'm trying to create a KPI dashboard on data compliance/completeness in C4C Analysis workcenter.

For this I'd ideally like to create COUNT key figures for the associated KPIs, as these can be tracked and timestamped with our external reporting tool (SAC). I'm trying to create a restricted key figure on the Opportunity Header and Item data source and am using fixed value selections to COUNT only when the Product is Null (#). The result is expected to be a 1 when there is no product associated to the opportunity. 

I've used Contains "#" as per the screenshot, but it doesn't appear to be working and counts all opportunities. I'm presuming it's an issue with the standard combined data source and perhaps it's looking at the wrong line of data in the report. Do I need to change the data source in order to achieve this? I'm trying to achieve the same result with Lost opportunities containing Competitor data and was hoping to do as much with one report / data source as possible.

Any thoughts welcome and appreciated. 

Many thanks,

Chris

entry.title: Re: Create Hierarchies in a automatic way SAC
entry.content: check this help page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/a8435da6970041d2beb3299cdcff7026.html?state=DRAFT#import-data-into-public-dimensions

entry.title: Re: BusinessObject DEV CMS DB deleted .How to refresh it...
entry.content: That looks like a database error. I've seen it happen in Oracle when CMS queries were running too long, but I've never seen it during an installation. The SIA log file might have more useful info, or you might need a DBA to check the database.

entry.title: Factory Calendar to Block Sales Order First Dates
entry.content:
Is there a way to block sales order First Dates using the Factory Calendar, or some other functionality?  I would like to block the use of certain dates within SAP so that sales orders cannot be scheduled to ship on weekends, holidays, and shut downs.  I do NOT want to have to do this at the customer level or for every sales order individually.  I would also like for these blocked dates to be visible to Planning and Purchasing when they are running MRP.

FYI - I am in customer service so would need detailed instructions to give to whomever can control/manage this, as I have limited access in SAP.

entry.title: Re: Available quantity for prod. XXXXXX is not sufficient...
entry.content:
Hi,

"In my outbound process I am packing and adding packaging item in EWM using OPHU and PAC item category."

I suppose you create the item automatically?

Where do you have stock for the packing material? And did you maintain the goods movement bin determination (TA /SCWM/GMBIN_DET)?

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: The Procurement Monthly - November 2024
entry.content: Good one @GordonDonovan1. Nice to see a summary of major Procurement surveys & studies at one place 👍

entry.title: Re: Restrict/Approval for production changes using transp...
entry.content: I have created an enhancement with Request ID: 335105

entry.title: How do we restrict the user assignments in SAP MDG Substitution? Do we have any enhancement option?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement in the SAP MDG CR approval process that the requestor should never be able to approve the change request even if he/she is part of the approval group. We have achieved this by implementing the MDG Agent determination BAdI. 

However, this does not fulfill the requirement 100%. Because, our customer uses the "Workflow Substitution" feature extensively in order to substitute another user to act on the change request actions during the vacation period etc. 

When we use the Workflow substitution, there is a possibility that the rule gets violated if the requestor is acting as substitution for the approver. 

So, do have any standard way of handling this requirement in the Workflow substitution or any standard enhancement option like BAdI in the Substitution?

Any input or information is very much appreciated.

entry.title: Short Dump from SAVE_MODIFIED method, managed with additional save scenario
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are using RAP managed with additional save scenario for only CURD operations with a large custom table and also we have requirement to do PGI before custom table update.

In SAVE_MODIFIED methos, we have done the we have done the PGI using CALL FUNCTION with DESTINATION 'NONE' and after successful , custom table will UPDATE.

But we are getting following dump when all operation completed.  

 

But PGI done successfully but database not updated.

If we do either PGI or only update then database table then both scenario working properly.  

But when do both same time it will not work. 
Can you please suggest what is the issue?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba 2411 Release Key Innovations Preview
entry.content: Thanks @Bertaus

entry.title: Auto Release of Orders In Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can we auto release maintenance orders in fiori when the order is saved?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) - JDBC Adapter - Step-by-step guide - Pre-requisites and Configurati
entry.content:
Hi @pg888 ,

Actually my reply above is to response back to my initial question post earlier, that i hope could help other in future that planning to use batch insert.

I am not sure your issue yet, haven't really test with non-Atomic mode.  Probably you could raise at ticket to SAP, but high chance SAP would ask you talk to the DBA instead to find out if there is any log.

And I will think depend what is the root cause of the error, if the occurred error stopped the JDBC processes( the error occur before any record is processed, then I think nothing will be inserted into DB from that Batch.

I think you should be more familiar than me on this, probably try reach out SAP on sharing your situation + providing all the error logs that you could see from the SAP and also from the DB if there is any. Hopefully someone can help you.

entry.title: Re: Stock check when creating the requisition or Shopping...
entry.content:
Hello @Wesley89 

I don't think you are going to find such a check in SAP standard. In my opinion, it is more of a business process issue. It looks like you are holding too much stock, so you can cover with it unexpected requirements resulting from ad-hoc requests to a cost center or an order. 

In principle, all the stock that you hold should result from planned requirements e.g. sales forecast, production plan etc. So the stock covers those requirements and there should not be much stock excess to be consumed by ad-hoc requests. Otherwise the stock levels are too high.

If you allow users to request purchases to cost centers or orders, it means that those unexpected requirements should not be fulfilled from stock. Otherwise, users should request issues from stock to cost center or orders. 

If you really need to decide whether a purchase request should be covered from stock, you could implement a release procedure. A user responsible for approving a request would need to first check if the request can be safely fulfilled from stock.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: missing .getUTCFullYear()
entry.content:
hi,
will .getUTCFullYear() be included in available date methods in the near future? Year end could be problematic without this method.
and according to MSN .getYear() is deprecated => will it be removed from SAC too?

Ty & BR
Edgar

entry.title: Re: Recover package in SAP CPI : Deleted by Mistake
entry.content:
Guys,

We have a way to recover a deleted iflow.

1) Go to Manage Integration Content

2)Select the iflow that you have deleted or iflow you want to recover

3) On the right corner next to restart, you have drop down. select download

4) Jar file gets downloaded and you can upload the same Jar file in the Design

 

Cheers,

Vivek S

entry.title: Error : SOAP:1023 SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("Connection closed")
entry.content:
Hi ABAP gurus, 

I have created a Service Consumer using Proxy Class with WSDL provided to connect to the third party system. I have similarly designed other Service Consumer using Proxy Class which are working fine and data is being received by third party system.

However, for one different functionality for which i have done similar SOAMANAGER configuration activity, the class method call of the Proxy class is giving the error message : SOAP:1023 SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("Connection closed") and it is being captured in TRY- ENDTRY block using CATCH statement.

Reference sample code below : 

I also searched SAP community but could not find any solution.

Kindly let me know what can be the probable solution for this error.

Thanks in advance. 

Devendra

entry.title: Re: Create Hierarchies in a automatic way SAC

entry.title: Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to get your answer faster!
entry.content:
Welcome to the SAP Community!

This is your go-to community for any how-to question on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Our members include experts from customers, partners and SAP who are here to share their knowledge with you and build a strong community together.

Now here are 6 easy steps to help you post a question that will actually be answered faster:

1. Select category “Enterprise Resource Planning”
We recommend the ERP category for your question on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 
Would you like to post your question in the private Partner Group instead? Go here: Partner Delivery Group

2. Choose the correct managed tag(s)
Did you know that our experts and most community members use tags to find relevant content and track questions? Choosing the correct tag for your question will directly send it to the right experts!

Here’s a list of most used SAP S/4HANA Cloud tags. Please choose the tag that fits your topic or business area best:

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Supply Chain
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Professional Services
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Human Resources
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Research and Development
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud for enterprise portfolio and project management
  • SAP Project and Resource Management
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Localization
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Data Migration

If you have a very general question that does not really fit with one of the topic tags, you can use the general tag (but this should be the exception):

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Is your question about another product? Follow this link to find a list of all managed tags in SAP Community.

3. Enter a smart subject
A smart subject line that clearly mentions the exact topic or issue will help experts to find your question faster!

4. Describe your issue as detailed as possible
The more details you can provide, the better we can understand your issue and help you out faster! Use screenshots to show what you are trying to do in the system (but make sure not to disclose any sensitive information captured in the screenshot).
All this will help reduce follow-up questions that can slow down the process.

5. Respond to comments
After you have posted your question, our experts may add a comment to ask for more details. SAP Community will send you a notification that a user has commented on your question. Don't forget to respond in time so that they can help you faster!

6. Accept a helpful answer as solution
Are you happy with the answer that you received? Make sure to click “Accept as Solution” so that other users can see that your problem was solved. You can also give a kudo to show your appreciation.

Ready to get started? Post your first question!

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can find more enablement for SAP S/4HANA Cloud here:

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Community Page
  • Enablement Assets
  • Explore the ready-to-run cloud ERP here: https://www.sap.com/products/erp/s4hana.html
  • Watch our SAP S/4HANA Cloud product update videos on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWV533hWWvDnnyN2j-CcUheNN-GaNCb3H
  • Check out our digital enablement wheel here: https://chart-bdmaicr0au.dispatcher.eu2.hana.ondemand.com/index.html?hc_reset
  • Listen to our podcast here: https://podcast.opensap.info/inside-sap/
  • Watch our openSAP microlearnings to learn about SAP S/4HANA Cloud topics at your own pace here: https://microlearning.opensap.com/
  • Find best practices on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition here: https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/latest?region=DE
  • Check out what’s new here: https://help.sap.com/doc/ce01d82756b947a1a043a5d5a3204226  
  • Find help here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD
  • Read the feature scope description here: https://help.sap.com/doc/7c9e0bbbd1664c2581b2038a1c7ae4b3

entry.title: Missing privileges to publish the changes on Budget version
entry.content:
Hello,

I am setting up DAC (Data access control) on Company code level. To verify the authorizations, I am running the data action in story and it failed to update the data in Budget version. The error message showing you are missing privileges to publish the changes on Budget version.

For my requirement DAC only for Company code and not required to Version dimension.

After Roles and Teams setup in system, Users are able to access the stories by required Company code. But DA unable to update the data in Budget version. (Publishing data through DA)

How to update/write data in any version (Budget). And What configuration is missing.

Regards,
Vasu

entry.title: Re: message no M7042. Batch does not exist?
entry.content: Hello, Cancel the inspection lot within transaction QA02 should be solving your issue. Please also check to delete obsolete batch from inspection lot with QA02. Rgds Reinhard

Richa

entry.title: Preparation ledger error when running the Consistency Check of Settings for FI Integration
entry.content:
Hi,

when running the "Consistency Check of Settings for FI Integration", i get the error message:

Message no. FINCS_MD203

Diagnosis

There’s no consolidation unit (CU) for preparation ledger integration in consolidation version I10.

Procedure

Set the 'Transfer from Universal Journal' data transfer method for at least one consolidation unit.

 

The message suggests that i need to set the transfer from universal journal option for the ConsUnit. I have done this so i do not understand the error:

Did anyone already face this issue and knows how to solve it?

all setup parts seem fine (1001 as from year for preparation ledger, Method assigned to ConsUnit, etc.)

best regards Rene

entry.title: Re: SAP ILM : Blocking a partner does not work

entry.title: Re: Search annotation not working when using built-in fun...
entry.content:
No. In the backend, it generates Native HANA sql for the search and we get a dump. There is no useful information in the termination result on why it happened.

If we comment the built-in function currency_conversion and then search, we get the search results back.

entry.title: SLD Data Supplier to to SAP's Support Backbone, for SAP HANA, through a Web Proxy
entry.content:
Good Afternoon,

I would like to configure SLD Data Supplier to Directly Send Data to SAP's Support Backbone as documented in SAP Note 2855951, for a Hana Database.

My HDB Server can not connect directly to the Internet.
It has to use a Web Proxy to create a outgoing HTTP connection to supply.landscape.services.sap.

Note 2855951 does note explain how to proceed to configure a web proxy for hdblcm configuration.
It describes the configuration through a proxy only for an AS ABAP.

Could you you tell me how I could configure a web proxy for this SLD configuration ?

For an AS ABAP, it is also possible to use a SAP Router instead of a web proxy.
Is it also possible to configure the SLD of my HDB to use a SAP router instead of Web Proxy?

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Re: How to find a CDS view for a classic Table in ABAP? - Cheat Sheet
entry.content:
Hi @LBretschneider 

Thanks for sharing the Excel Cheat Sheet and insights about CDS Views. It's very helpful! 

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Search annotation not working when using built-in function CURRENCY_CONVERSION
entry.content: No. In the backend, it generates Native HANA sql for the search and we get a dump. There is no useful information in the termination result on why it happened. If we comment the built-in function currency_conversion and then search, we get the search results back.

entry.title: Re: Do "address locks" occur for Data [pages] Only Locked (DOL) tables?
entry.content: Can claim I fully understand the topic - but to all my understanding yes, this is correct.

entry.title: Re: sh: 1: fiori: not found-> The most popular error for Fiori Developers
entry.content:
In case anyone else doesn't find their answers here, for simple Fiori apps if you haven't installed npm libs and try to run an app you will get the sh: 1: fiori: not found

I had forgotten to do $ npm init in my new dev space in BAS.

entry.title: Write into 'Header Note' text of PR
entry.content:
Hi Peers,

I have a case where I need to write data into HEADER NOTE text area of PR through an Inbound Integration data. any idea how can I achieve this ? I am attaching a screenshot for reference.

 

 

Help Appreciated

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: Re: Facing error when creating MTO Production Order
entry.content:
Hi @yKim 

 

Please follow the KBA  https://me.sap.com/notes/0003366337

 

In SSCUI 102447  Define Checking Control, for the used Order type and plant, the Material Availability check is set as No Check.


Tick off the 'No check' indicator and maintain the checking rule in this SSCUI.

Note : 'No check' means no automatic material availability check is to be executed for the specified business transaction (order creation or order release).
The option of calling up a material availability check manually and also of executing a collective availability check is not affected by setting this indicator.

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention Summit: Uniting Thought Leaders for Success
entry.content:
The Summit is scheduled for April 13-15, 2025

We are excited to announce that the SAP MaxAttention Summit is taking place in Munich, Germany, from April 13-15, 2025. This exclusive event is an onsite, in-person gathering designed for the SAP MaxAttention community to engage with thought leaders, SAP experts, and peers from some of the world's leading organizations.

What to expect

From Sunday evening through Tuesday afternoon, the summit will feature captivating keynotes from SAP executives, customer experience sessions, and in-depth expert discussions. In addition, there will be a variety of networking opportunities, including a welcome reception, a special evening event, and one-on-one meetings.

  • Take the opportunity to connect with members of the SAP Executive Board and engage in in-depth expert discussions.
  • Participants will be able to experience SAP MaxAttention in action and learn how leading companies within the SAP MaxAttention community establish their individual North Star enterprise architecture, transition to RISE with SAP, and integrate innovations like SAP Business AI.
  • Moreover, the summit provides you with a chance to connect with a select group of SAP's largest customers, to build relationships, and to gain valuable insights that can take your business to the next level.

Event Location

Welcome Reception (Sunday, April 13, 2025)

Take a look at our booklet 

Check out our booklet including more information around the location, key topics and agenda now. 

Customers eligible to join this exclusive SAP MaxAttention event will be invited personally in January.  

We can't wait to see you in Munich next April for what promises to be an unforgettable experience. Let's come together to learn, connect, and drive success! 

In case of questions, please don’t hesitate to reach out.

entry.title: Re: HOW IS SPECIAL STOCK INDICATOR DETERMINED IN PP rewor...
entry.content:
Hi Sally.

Please check the settlement profile assigned to the order type which you're using in OPJH. 

And go to t-code OKO7 and check the configuration profile settings. refer the below screen shot, for WBS element it should be 1- Settlement optional.

Thanks & Regards

Ramesh Sigi

entry.title: IBP Excel Add in Editable Key Figure greyed out
entry.content:
Hello!

Normally if Key figure is non-editable it will be greyed out in excel planning view, but if it is editable, color of cells will be white. But now I see that for editable Key figures color of cells is grey.

Although if KF is all editable, it's white, but if it is editable in current of future period, it is grey.

I have administrator rights, so it is for sure not question of permissions.

Also after setting check on the Default Format for Editable Cells in the IBP formatting sheets, it is getting white, but I expect it to be whit by default.

Maybe there is something what I should check in order get cells white for editable cells by default?

On the screenshot KF Approve country DP Short is editable and I can change values there, but color of cells is grey.

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion in People Story reports
entry.content:
Hi @Aneta_Krysiak ,

In our instance, we have this in Canvas , Advance Reporting. Check your Foundation Tables. As shared before, we are not seeing this in Story data schema yet :(...hope SF add this in the upcoming future.

I don't know if this is a "standard" configuration or this is something was built for our instance. You can check with your SF support.

entry.title: Re: Updated Learning Journey - Exploring the Lead to Cash Business Process in SAP Customer Experienc
entry.content:
Hello @FernandoRedondo,

This is an amazing course for refreshing the SAP CX, Lead to Cash Business Process. I enjoyed reading through each section which is very well described followed by a quiz.
Sharing my Record of Achievement - Digital Badge

Kunal Bansal - L2C Certificate
Thank you once again for sharing.
Best Regards,
Kunal

entry.title: Re: Write into 'Header Note' text of PR
entry.content:
You can use BAPI_PR_CHANGE

  • Header long text to provide in parameter PRHEADERTEXT of BAPI
  • Identify exact key : double-click on text area in ME52N to display text in fullscreen mode, and in the menu navigate: goto, header (ID should be B01, object EBANH)

entry.title: Re: Rejection/ Reminder for RFQ's via Fiori using BRF+ ou...
entry.content:
Hi Samanda,

Please have a look at S/4 HANA standard functionality of situation handling to send reminder emails. 

Use Cases for Situation Handling | SAP Help Portal

There are multiple use cases for sourcing and procurement, just identify which one suits you and see if it can be used.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: WM Best Practices
entry.content: I'm also looking for documentation for WM best practices

entry.title: Re: Error : SOAP:1023 SRT: Processing error in Internet C...
entry.content:
Hi Raymond,

Thanks a Lot for your Reply !!

After your suggestion i used transaction SRT_UTIL , applied --> Functional Trace <-- and executed my program and here is the log it shows after refresh : 

-ERROR_MESSAGE  --> Connection to server broken (ICM_HTTP_CONNECTION_BROKEN)

The thing is that roughly 2-3 times out of 10 the program works also and it doesnot give the error but the execution of my original program is not consistent as 80 % of the times it is giving error : SOAP:1023 SRT: Processing error in Internet Communication Framework: ("Connection closed") in catch statement. 

What could be the probable solution for this ? 

Best Regards,

Devendra

entry.title: Re: Short Dump from SAVE_MODIFIED method, managed with additional save scenario
entry.content: did you debug? why the subrc is 4?

entry.title: Re: UI5 App with Standalone App Router gets: Timed out wa...
entry.content: Hi, What was the service request template you used? Which IPs did you add? I'd like to have an example of how to request it from SAP

entry.title: Re: Write into 'Header Note' text of PR
entry.content: Hi Raymond,
